'''Peggy Roberts-Hope''' provided the voice of [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] in the [[1995]] game ''[[Star Wars: Dark Forces]]'' and in one of its sequels, ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Mysteries of the Sith]]''. She also voiced Mon Mothma and an Alliance Command Center Communications Officer in [[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']].

Outside ''[[Star Wars]]'', she voiced [[w:c:maniacmansion:Edna Edison|Edna]] and  [[w:c:maniacmansion:Zedna Edison|Zedna Edison]] in the talkie CD version of the [[Lucasarts]] video game ''[[wikipedia:Day of the Tentacle|Day of the Tentacle]]''.
